path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\01. Opening - Bombing Mission.mp3
description: This is great. Bombing mission is so good! But the music is good because the original is so strong. The orchestral instruments aren't amazing.
title: Opening - Bombing Mission
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\02. Let the Battles Begin!.mp3
description: A classic. When you talk about all-time JRPG battle themes, you have to talk about this. I love the constant build-ups with the melody.
title: Let the Battles Begin!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\03. Those Who Fight (AC Version).mp3
description: Advent Children, this bizarre film from 2005, is represented in smash! It has some rock remixes of the classics which, alright sure!
title: Those Who Fight (AC Version)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\04. Fight On!.mp3
description: Amazing boss battle music from the original game. This is timeless. I love the organ lines.
title: Fight On!
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\05. Those Who Fight Further (AC Version).mp3
description: An insanely long track taking us on an odyssey of this boss battle theme. It's wild and it's good.
title: Those Who Fight Further (AC Version)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\06. Aerith's Theme.mp3
description: Aerith's Theme is great but I don't really enjoy this remix so much.
title: Aerith's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

filename: 07. Main Theme of FINAL FANTASY VII.mp3
path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\07. Main Theme of FINAL FANTASY VII.mp3
description: The main theme from the overworld of the original game is like an incredible achievement in VGM history. It's epic, multi-phased and beautiful. This remix rushes it a bit I think. Also the sound is kinda compressed or something.
title: Main Theme of FINAL FANTASY VII
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\08. JENOVA.mp3
description: So good that they put in the original Jenova!! Love that repeating high synth. It's so intense!
title: JENOVA
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\09. Cosmo Canyon.mp3
description: Shout-outs to Yoko for selecting this fan favourite track from deeper in the soundtrack. It's great. The key changes feel a bit unnecessary. It's kinda lowkey and giving Jolene vibes.
title: Cosmo Canyon
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\10. One-Winged Angel.mp3
description: The most iconic boss music ever probably. It's still great after all this time.
title: One-Winged Angel
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 28 - Final Fantasy (3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2015)\11. Advent One-Winged Angel.mp3
description: An epic, orchestrated version of this iconic theme from Advent Children. It's a 6 minute experience! It is good.
title: Advent One-Winged Angel
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 28: Final Fantasy
